zh.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen是Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen和Beatrix von Schweinfurt的女兒，於大約1075年出生在德國爾特波格賀倫格希爾德利札森。她於1106年與Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1115年在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 維登布盧可利特格享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen是Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen和Beatrix von Schweinfurt的女儿，于大约1075年出生在德国爾特波格賀倫格希爾德利札森。她于1106年与Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1115年在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 維登布盧可利特格享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen was born about 1075, in Hildrizhausen, Herrenberg, Württemberg, Germany as the daughter of Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen and Beatrix von Schweinfurt. She married Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg in 1106. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1115, in Rietberg, Kreis Wiedenbrück, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen est née environ 1075, à Hildrizhausen, Herrenberg, Württemberg, Allemagne, fille de Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen et Beatrix von Schweinfurt. Elle a épousé Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg en 1106. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1115, à Rietberg, Kreis Wiedenbrück, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen wurde um 1075 in Hildrizhausen, Herrenberg, Württemberg, Deutschland, als Tochter von Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen und Beatrix von Schweinfurt geboren. Sie hat 1106 Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1115 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Rietberg, Kreis Wiedenbrück, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen è nata il circa 1075 nel Hildrizhausen, Herrenberg, Württemberg, Germania come figlia di Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen e Beatrix von Schweinfurt. Lei sposato Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg nel 1106. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1115, nel Rietberg, Kreis Wiedenbrück, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausenは約1075年にドイツウuルッテンバーグハーレンバーグヒルドリズハウセンでHeinrich II  Markgraf von HildrizhausenとBeatrix von Schweinfurtの娘として生まれた。1106年にGraf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1115年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ウィエデンブルuックリートバーグで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen(은)는 대략 1075년 독일 wu르테버그 허런버그 힐드리즈하우센에서 Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen(와)과 Beatrix von Schweinfurt의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1106년 Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1115년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 위덴브uc크 리트버그에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen nasceu aproximadamente 1075, em Hildrizhausen, Herrenberg, Württemberg, Alemanha filha de Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen e Beatrix von Schweinfurt. Ela casou-se com Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg em 1106. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1115, em Rietberg, Kreis Wiedenbrück, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen родилась около 1075 г. в местности хаилдрижаусен, хирренбирг, вuрттембирг, Германия. Её родителей звали Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen и Beatrix von Schweinfurt. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg в 1106 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1115 г. в местности риетбирг, крис виеденбрuкк, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Hildrizhausen nació aproximadamente 1075, en Hildrizhausen, Herrenberg, Württemberg, Alemania como hija de Heinrich II  Markgraf von Hildrizhausen y Beatrix von Schweinfurt. Se casó con Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg en 1106. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1115, en Rietberg, Kreis Wiedenbrück, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 41 años.
